{{Quote|I'd better go. Got to look legit by catching up with Vevut Squad.|General Bardan Jusik|<ref name="True Colors" />}}
'''Vevut Squad''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[unit]] that was part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="True Colors" /> With all of its members [[Reproduction/Legends|created]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], Vevut [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] was trained by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Rav Bralor]].<ref name="Order 66" />

In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' to [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> Vevut Squad was [[Delta Squad/Legends|one]] [[Veshok Squad|of]] [[Omega Squad|the]] many [[Commando/Legends|commando]] units commanded by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Bardan Jusik]].<ref name="True Colors" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TERC2">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' to [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> Vevut Squad—now under command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]—went to the Republic [[Station Nerrif]] to be reassigned. [[Dec]], the sergeant of the squad, led Tur-Mukan to the mess and encouraged her to eat something, after exiting their shuttle. Tur-Mukan noted that the squad behaved like sons trying to please their mother.<ref name="Order 66" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vevut Squad was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'', a [[2007]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="True Colors" /> In [[2008]], the squad made its first appearance in [[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel|''Order 66'']], the following novel in the [[Republic Commando|''Republic Commando'' series]], which was also written by Traviss.<ref name="Order 66" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{1st}}
